title: The Elephant Speaks
description: On pages 18–20, this part focuses on the elephant speaks within the The Elephant Speaks storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: o-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh my go- saru!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's claimed down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What in the world happened down there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I do not know... I no longer see anything.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: cannot hear the voice anymore either.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So you mean to say...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: That Zuneshaa used its trunk...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: To sink Jack's fleet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Y- Y- Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So it happened Gosaru! In one fell blow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My word... I never even considered...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: That Zuneshaa possessed its own will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: much less that it would respond to commands...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Was Lord Oden aware of this power of Lord Momoo- Suke's?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, hey! Why the long faces still?!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Everyone is in shock over what has just trans- fired...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: First off, if we do not figure out how Jack navigated his way here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This place will no longer be safe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oh. Okay! Go get 'em! Shishishi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How crazy is it that Zou is on our side now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You sure are a cheery one... go- Ronyanya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well then, we'll be off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do me a favor and give us a Buncha food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: New World a Certain Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PURU- RURU RURU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PURURU- GACHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Appappapa~ It appears our commu- nications with Jack...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: have been cut off due to the sea,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Lord Kaidou!

summary: The Elephant Speaks: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
